message:
style(fnx-algorithms,fnx-cgse,conformance): rustfmt formatting pass

Apply rustfmt to files that drifted from canonical formatting:

- fnx-algorithms: break long function call arguments across multiple lines
  for cgse_publish(), matching_edge_weight_or_default() calls
- fnx-cgse: reformat DeterministicHash variant to single-line, break long
  finalize() signature across lines, expand single-line struct/if expressions
- fnx-conformance adversarial tiebreak corpus test: flatten nested match
  inside collect_witnesses closure, reformat import groups, break long
  iterator chains and assert messages

No behavioral changes — purely formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
